notes.body: Power of One / Ops Manual: the updated Operations Manual is our single source of truth — reference it and train consistency. One Brand, One Team, One Family. Each GM controls standards, operations, hiring, and training in their restaurant.

GM Call Recap (Louisville Market): live the Values (Servant Leadership, Positive Attitude, Integrity, Confidence, Enthusiasm) — not wall words. Every guest leaves with a 'Wow' — genuine connections at the register, make line, and pickup.
This week's GM/AGM call is CANCELED — watch for a reschedule. Standing: any outside-vendor call (plumbing/electrical/etc.) still needs a hub ticket for tracking + warranty.
2 open tasks: L-Rev (due 06/25) and VO-Inv-Performance Fdsvce (due 06/26). Close both today before they age into the report.
New hire Chloe Hatfield — background check requested. Added to employee directory with phone PENDING. Active count 29 -> 30. Pull phone from BG-check PDF or HR (jmoffatt@estep-co.com).
